steps.action: Open / in dedicated clean browser session
steps.expected: First-time welcome card with subtitle and New Keyset/Import Device Profile/Onboard buttons is visible
steps.observed: Welcome screen rendered first-time variant with subtitle 'Split your Nostr key. Sign from anywhere.' and all 3 action buttons

evidence.network: GET http://127.0.0.1:5173/ and Vite assets loaded; no failed requests observed

steps.action: Click New Keyset from first-time welcome
steps.expected: Navigate to /create and Create Keyset form renders
steps.observed: URL changed to http://127.0.0.1:5173/create and Create New Keyset form with keyset inputs rendered

evidence.network: Navigation to /create occurred via client-side routing; no failed requests observed

assertions.title: Import button navigates to Import flow

steps.action: Click Import Device Profile from welcome
steps.expected: Import flow entry (Load Backup) renders with heading and inputs
steps.observed: URL changed to http://127.0.0.1:5173/import and Load Backup screen rendered with backup input, upload button, and Continue

evidence.network: Navigation to /import occurred via client-side routing; no failed requests observed

assertions.title: Onboard button navigates to Onboard flow

steps.expected: Onboard entry (Enter Package) renders with heading and inputs
steps.observed: URL changed to http://127.0.0.1:5173/onboard and Enter Onboarding Package screen rendered with package/password inputs and Begin Onboarding button

evidence.network: Navigation to /onboard occurred via client-side routing; no failed requests observed

assertions.title: First-visit with no saved profiles shows first-time welcome UI

steps.action: Open / in clean isolated session and inspect DOM
steps.expected: First-time welcome variant present; Welcome back absent; no profile rows
steps.observed: DOM check returned hasFirstTimeSubtitle=true, hasWelcomeBack=false, profileRows=0; New Keyset/Import Device Profile/Onboard present

evidence.network: GET http://127.0.0.1:5173/ and app assets loaded; no failed requests observed

frictions.description: Request log was reset when clearing diagnostics, so network evidence was captured after executing assertion flows.
frictions.resolution: Collected network request evidence after flow execution using agent-browser network requests.

summary: Tested 5 assigned assertions in isolated clean session: 5 passed, 0 failed, 0 blocked. First-time welcome UI and entry navigations to Create/Import/Onboard all worked with no console errors.
